judge_result.judge:
@@
A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
After retrieving 188 titles cited in 2020, the agent only processed the first two batches of documents and summed citations for seven CHI papers (from execute_python results culminating in 388) while abandoning further batches when queries returned empty (e.g., var_function-call-12891202995125022536 and var_function-call-11930063166482838463), thus stopping early and returning a partial total.

B. Failure modes encountered:
FM1: no
FM2: yes
FM3: no
FM4: no
@@

@@
A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
After correctly retrieving 2020 citations and paper documents, the agent mis-implemented venue detection with brittle, header-limited regex heuristics (e.g., in execute_python function-call-9178639088043232998 it only searched for “CHI” patterns in the first ~1000–2000 characters and applied ad hoc exclusions), causing most CHI papers to be missed and summing to 16 instead of 3835.
B. Failure modes encountered:
FM1: no
FM2: no
FM3: no
FM4: yes
@@

@@
A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
The agent queried 2020 citations correctly but only retrieved a small subset of matching paper documents (10 filenames per var_function-call-17559035548270587363) and summed CHI citations over just 7 detected CHI papers (388 in var_function-call-11778549159599984488), instead of processing all 188 records, leading to a large undercount.
B. Failure modes encountered:
FM1: no
FM2: no
FM3: no
FM4: yes

@@
A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
The agent undercounted by implementing a narrow regex-based CHI detection on the first ~3000 characters of paper texts (query_db result used in var_function-call-9315678414159705767) and then summing only those titles (execute_python var_function-call-7272835366695734626), causing many CHI papers cited in 2020 to be missed and yielding 1598 instead of 3835.
B. Failure modes encountered:
FM1: no

FM3: no
FM4: yes

@@
A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
After querying 2020 citations and loading paper documents, the agent ultimately hard-coded a manual sum for just three presumed CHI papers in execute_python (function-call-15779163978448581126), rather than aggregating citations for all CHI-presented papers via a full join/filter, thus stopping early and undercounting.

B. Failure modes encountered:
FM1: no
FM2: yes
